message:
fix: address code review findings for transcript logging

- C1: Move OnCompactionTurn callback setup to session construction
      (was reassigned every tool loop iteration)
- I1: Append after Close returns nil silently (atomic.Bool guard)
- I2: OpenTranscriptWriter reads file once instead of three times
- I3: Use max(seq)+1 for starting seq (handles mid-file corruption)
- I4: Explicit TurnCheckpoint/TurnSummary case in message builder
- M1: Set Kind/FormatVersion inside NewTranscriptWriter, not callers
- M2: RestoreSession fallback header includes parent linkage fields
- M3: Concurrent test verifies seq uniqueness
- M4: readTranscriptLines fails on unexpected blank lines
- M5: Consistent error wrapping in transcript.go
- Add test: 1MB entry round-trip (scenario 16)
- Add test: write failure emits warning (scenario 18)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
